data.title: Nasdaq Files to List VanEck Avalanche ETF, Bringing AVAX Closer to Mainstream
data.description:
TL;DR Nasdaq has officially submitted an application to the SEC to list VanEck’s proposed Avalanche ETF, offering regulated exposure to the AVAX token without direct purchase. VanEck continues to expand its crypto ETF portfolio, adding Avalanche to its prior filings for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana. The move to include Avalanche in these investment products shows. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/nasdaq-files-to-list-vaneck-avalanche-etf-bringing-avax-closer-to-mainstream/

data.title: Coinbase International will launch COMP, UXLINK, and ATH perpetual contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Coinbase International Station will launch COMP, UXLINK, and ATH perpetual contract transactions.

data.title: A 2-year ETH holder deposited 2,300 ETH to Kraken, equivalent to approximately $3.58 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, a 2-year ETH holder deposited 2,300 ETH (about $3.58 million) to Kraken half an hour ago. Two years ago, the address accumulated these ETH at an average price of $1,298. If sold at the current price, the address will make a profit of about $600,000.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bowman Highlights Strong U.S. Economy Amid Trade Policy Concerns
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman stated on Thursday that the U.S. economy remains robust, with recent data indicating a decline in inflation last month. Despite acknowledging investor concerns over U.S. President Donald Trump's trade policies potentially harming the economy and causing recent financial market volatility, Bowman refrained from commenting on how tariffs might affect inflation or the labor market.

During a hearing reviewing her nomination for Vice Chair of Supervision at the Federal Reserve, Bowman remarked, "We are observing and waiting to see how these policy paths continue to evolve, and we will understand their economic impact." She added, "It is currently unclear because we do not know what the economic policies will look like."

data.title: An Ethereum whale sold 7,974 ETH at $1,479 in the past two hours, equivalent to about $11.8 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a certain Ethereum OG began to sell ETH after three years of silence. In the past two hours, he sold 7,974 ETH (about 11.8 million US dollars) at a price of US$1,479, and currently still holds 30,606 ETH (about 40.07 million US dollars).

data.title: Majority of Bitcoin Holders Remain Profitable Despite Recent Price Dip
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin News reported on X that over 85% of Bitcoin holders are still in profit, even amid the recent price lows experienced this week.

data.title: U.S. House Approves Budget Plan to Extend 2017 Tax Cuts
data.description:
According to Odaily, the U.S. House of Representatives passed a budget plan on Wednesday, setting the stage for extending the tax cuts introduced by U.S. President Donald Trump in 2017. The budget was approved with a narrow margin of 216 votes in favor and 214 against, with all Democrats and two Republicans opposing due to concerns over insufficient spending cuts. This approval is a preliminary but necessary step for Republicans to bypass Democratic opposition and pass a tax cut bill along party lines later this year.

The legislation, passed on Thursday, serves as a broad budget framework with minimal details. Following the budget's approval, the upcoming package aims to reduce taxes by up to $5.3 trillion over the next decade and raise the debt ceiling by $5 trillion in exchange for $4 billion in spending cuts. House Speaker Johnson had initially aimed for the bill's passage on Wednesday but delayed action due to some Republican members' objections over inadequate spending reductions.
